hooks.name: Run Tests on Task Completion
hooks.description: Runs the full Ruby (RSpec) and JavaScript (Jest) test suites after a spec task completes, and resolves any failures before continuing.

action.prompt: Run the full test suite for this project. First run the Ruby tests with `bundle exec rspec`, then run the JavaScript tests with `npm test`. If any tests fail, analyze the failures, fix the underlying code, and re-run the failing suite until all tests pass. Do not proceed until both suites are green.
